common.seo_title: Slice - Quick & Simple Group Expense Sharing
common.seo_description: Slice is a simple expense sharing tool designed for groups. Support anonymous and Google login, easily track expenses and calculate settlements. Perfect for dining, trips, and roommates.

auth.abandon_guest_msg: You are currently logged in as a guest. To link this to your Google account, you must abandon your guest data. Or, switch directly to your Google account.

groups.title: Group Dashboard
groups.no_groups: No groups yet. Create or join one!
groups.delete_group_msg: This will permanently delete the group '{{name}}' and all records. This cannot be undone.

members.delete_member_msg: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'? This cannot be undone.
